general.title: PRAxIS GROUP N.V. - MyPRAxIS
general.description: Application where administrative documents, customer data, reports and live alarm notifications can be consulted and managed.

common.subject: Subject
common.safePlace: We can take you to a safe place!
common.otherPlace: We can take you to an other place!
common.smsAndSms: SMS + SMS to technician on guard duty
common.smsAndEmail: SMS + e-mail to technician on guard duty
common.name: Name
common.dropCSVFilesToUpload: Drop CSV file here or click to upload
common.clickOnGroupToManageExceptions: Click on the group to manage exceptions

error.mustBeValidIpAddress: The provided IP address must be a valid IP address
error.cantDeleteException: Can't delete exception. Try again later.
error.pageDoesNotExist: Oops, this page does not exist anymore.
error.noPrimaryOrBackupContactAssigned: No primary or back-up contact has been assigned.

alerts.lastTenMinutesByDefault: If you don't provide a start or end date, the results will default to the last 10 minutes.

success.exceptionGranted: An exception to primary or back-up contact has been granted.

info.tooManyResultsPerformanceWarning: We've found 250 or more results based on your filters. To view more manageable data and ensure optimal performance, please refine your filters
info.selectFormulaOfYourGuardDuty: Use the field below to select the time at which the guard duty starts daily for your organisation and at which point the transition from one on-duty technician to the other takes place.
info.forMoreInfoSeeFAQ: For more information see our FAQ on the 'help' page
info.setItemsViaThisPage: You can set the following items via this page
info.coockieInfo: Cookies assist us in providing our services. By using our services, you expressly agree to our use of cookies.
info.exceptionsHaveBeenFound: Exceptions have been found. Go to 'exceptions' to see a review.
info.missingDataFoundInCalendar: Exclamation marks in the calendar indicate that missing data has been found. Add at least 1 contact per day so that we can carry out the desired guard duty formula for you
info.noPrimaryOrBackupContactAssigned: No primary or back-up contact has been assigned.
info.atLeastOneContactOnEveryDayOfMonth: At least 1 contact was added on every day of the month!
info.openViaComputerOrTablet: Open the application via computer or tablet
info.ifRemoveAlreadyAddedContactsFromGroup: If you remove contacts from a group that have already been identified on the calendar, they will therefore also be removed from the calendar.
info.calendarNotAvailableOnMobileDevices: Calendar currently not available on mobile devices
info.contactsFoundWithoutMailInCalendar: Contacts were found for which we do not yet have the e-mail address. As a result, these contacts will not appear and therefore cannot be selected in the groups and in the calendar.
info.manageContactsPerGroupOnDailyBasis: Manage per contact group who is the primary and back-up technician on guard duty on a daily basis.
